manual.intro: It's okay if you're not good with computers. Just follow the steps 😊 — Remember only 3 things: ① Log in ② Explore ③ Buy and Sell
manual.title: Cafe.pi's Easy User Manual

steps: Global 'Carrot': 200+ languages auto-translation · Pi easy payment · Chat·Used goods·Shops in one app · Connect by distance
Industry-agnostic 'Siren Order': Anyone can be a boss · Menu freedom · Instant notifications · O2O pickup
topics.title: Why Cafe.pi?

steps: EVENT #1: Top 100 participants who charge with Test Pi and complete 10 missions will receive 5,000 Bean
EVENT #2: Top 100 stores that register their shop, register menus, and complete a transaction test will receive 10,000 Bean
You can easily complete it by following the participation links for each mission in the Event tab.
topics.title: Event — Participate now

steps: In Pi Browser, press 'Generate Link Code' to get a 6-digit code (use within 10 minutes)
Copy the code (or link) and move it to a regular browser.
In the regular browser, after Google login, paste it and press 'Link' to complete the Pi + Google connection.
Pi Browser does not store information for security reasons, so the 6-digit code securely connects the two browsers.
topics.title: Login & Account Connection

steps: Enter a cafe room of your interest and start chatting for free.
If you turn on 'Nearby Cafes', it shows nearby cafes and neighbors by distance.
With automatic simultaneous interpretation, you can converse with anyone in 200+ languages in your own language.
topics.title: Cafes & Auto-Translation (PiRC1)

steps: Choose only the features you need and subscribe with Pi — you can start immediately with a free plan.
Subscribe only to what you need: PyCafé™ (Premium Cafe) · PyShop™ (Product Registration) · PyTranslate™ (Unlimited Translation)
Subscription fees are paid with Pi (PiRC2 recurring payment), and annual payments get 2 months free.
topics.title: Pi Subscription (PiRC2)

steps: Upload product photos and price (Pi), and they will be shown to people nearby along with your location.
View items available nearby by distance, and if you like them, order with Pi.
The Pi paid will be securely held by the platform (escrow) temporarily and then transferred to the seller once the transaction is complete.
topics.title: P2P Used Goods Trading (PiRC3, Escrow - Secure Transaction)

steps: In 'Shop Registration', set your shop name and location, and customers will find your nearby shop.
Register menu photos · prices · quantities.
When a customer orders, you receive an instant notification via Telegram (menu · quantity · amount).
Hand over items at the shop in the order of Preparing → Ready → Pickup.
topics.title: O2O Register My Shop, Register Products (PiRC3, Escrow - Secure Transaction)

steps: The Bean received from the current Testnet event is a promise from Cafe.pi.
When the platform officially launches on Mainnet,
The event Bean accumulated on Testnet will be paid out 1:1 as Mainnet Bean, as is.
This is Cafe.pi's principle to ensure that the efforts of early participants are not lost.
topics.title: Testnet Rewards, as is on Mainnet (Promise)

adminStats.subtitle: Active users · revenue statistics (daily rollup)

translate.costNote: Estimated cost is based on translated character count (1 token ≈ 4 chars, input tokens ≈ output×2). Check the Google AI Studio console for actual billing.
translate.noData: No translation data in this period

whitepaper.footer: Meets Pi Network listing criteria (Login, Payment, Security, Data Standard).
whitepaper.highlight1Desc: Supports Pi Account + Google Account. Integrated logins for Kakao, Line, WeChat, etc., will be added later.
whitepaper.highlight2Desc: Implements PiRC1 (Token Economy) · PiRC2 (Subscription Service) · PiRC3 (Escrow Secure Transactions).
whitepaper.intro: Cafe.pi structurally and cryptographically resolves the stringent constraints of Pi Browser, ensuring financial integrity and data standards from its inception.
whitepaper.pillar1Desc: Supports Pi account login and Pi payment as primary methods. Payments are made only with Pi, and Bean is a fixed internal reserve of 1 Pi = 100 Bean.
whitepaper.pillar2Desc: Even in Pi Browser, which does not store cookies, secure login and payment are ensured with token-based two-factor authentication. Client gate design without infinite loops.
whitepaper.pillar3Desc: All transactions are recorded in an append-only ledger, and the accounting conservation identity (Issuance = Circulation + Retrieval) is constantly verified. Over-issuance and double-spending are structurally impossible.
whitepaper.pillar3Title: 💰 Zero Tolerance for Financial Integrity Issues
whitepaper.pillar4Desc: Responds to KISA's 21 web vulnerability standards and defends against forgery, alteration, and timing attacks with HMAC-SHA256 signed tokens and constant-time comparison.
whitepaper.pillar5Desc: Applies Korea Data Agency (K-DATA) data standards from the first table and enforces them with automatic verification, ensuring long-term operational and audit reliability.
whitepaper.pillar6Desc: Provides fast initial screen and smooth usability through server-first rendering, parallel data fetching, stale-while-revalidate caching, and location, search, and bundle optimization.
whitepaper.title: Cafe.pi's Technical Strengths
